channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Access full episode transcripts of "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan" from 2026
item.description: View all full episode transcripts from 2026 of "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan."

item.title: Full transcript of "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan," June 21, 2026
item.description: This episode of "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan" features U.N. Ambassador Mike Waltz, Republican Sen. Lindsey Graham, and Democratic Rep. Jason Crow.

item.title: Seven killed and dozens injured in a series of weekend shootings in Chicago
item.description: Police report that a wave of shootings in Chicago has resulted in at least 38 injuries and seven deaths since Friday evening.

item.title: Trump says several people have been arrested for alleged vandalism of the Reflecting Pool
item.description: President Trump claims that issues with the Reflecting Pool in Washington are due to vandalism.
